sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dict_source (id UInt64, name String) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE DICTIONARY test_dict (key UInt64, value String) PRIMARY KEY key SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(HOST 'localhost' TABLE 'test_dict_source')) LAYOUT(flat);
SELECT dictGetOrDefault('test_dict', 'value', id, 'Unknown') AS retrieved_name FROM test_dict_source;
SELECT dictGetOrNull('test_dict', 'value', id) AS nullable_name FROM test_dict_source;
